name: XposedOrNot_CheckEmail
author: XposedOrNot
description: Fast check of an email address against the XposedOrNot data-breach database. Returns the list of breaches the address appears in. Free, no API key required.

configurationItems.name: key
configurationItems.description: Optional XposedOrNot API key (console.xposedornot.com) for higher rate limits and detailed responses. The analyzer is fully functional without it.
